Module overrungl.stb
Package overrungl.stb

Interface STBImageWrite

All Superinterfaces:
overrun.marshal.DirectAccess
public interface STBImageWrite extends overrun.marshal.DirectAccess
The STB image writer.

0.1.0

squid233
